name: Science probe
purpose: Space exploration

name: Spy probe
purpose: Espionage

name: Drone
purpose: Space battles (cannot independently fly between planets or suystems)

name: Fighter
purpose: Space battles (cannot independently fly between planets or suystems)

name: Bomber
purpose: High orbit bombing (cannot independently fly between planets or suystems)

name: Patrol
purpose: Patrol within star systems, enforce rule/keep the peace - lightly armed

name: Yacht
purpose: Equivalent of a car - civilian craft - likely many variaties of this in busy areas of space - not for player builds

name: Corvette
purpose: Patrol within star systems, enforce rule/keep the peace - moderately armed

name: Cargo
purpose: Freight hauling within a star system - civilian craft - likely many variaties of this in busy areas of space - not for player builds

name: Transport
purpose: Transport ship for soldiers - 250 packed like sardines - able to sustain weeks in space - limited defences

name: Frigate
purpose: Smallest interstellar manned vessel - able to sustain weeks in space

name: Detroyer
purpose: Interstellar fighting craft - able to sustain weeks in space

name: Large transport
purpose: Interstellar transport - 500 soldiers packed like sardines - able to sustain months in space

name: Large cargo
purpose: Interstellar freight hauling

name: Light cruiser
purpose: Deep space craft - able to sustain months in space

name: Heavy Cruiser
purpose: Deep space craft - able to sustain months in space

name: Large supplier
purpose: Deep space supply craft - can replenish food and ammo for an entire fleet

name: Carrier
purpose: Deep space carrier with 3 bays that can each contain either a destroyer, 5 fighters, 3 bombers or 10 drones.

name: Light Battleship
purpose: Deep space war craft - able to sustain months in space

name: Battleship
purpose: Deep space war theatre craft - able to sustain months in space

name: Heavy Battleship
purpose: Deep space war theatre craft - able to sustain months in space

name: Super carrier
purpose: Deep space war theatre craft - able to sustain months in space - 7 bays (as per carrier)

name: Battle station
purpose: Purpose built deep space military platform - able to remain in space indefeinitely - 5 Bays and 1 external docks for battleships

name: Small space station
purpose: Deep space military platform - able to remain in space indefeinitely - 6 Bays and 3 external docks for battleships

name: Space station
purpose: Deep space military platform - able to remain in space indefeinitely - 12 Bays and 6 external docks for battleships

name: Large space station
purpose: Deep space military platform - able to remain in space indefeinitely - 25 Bays and 9 external docks for battleships

name: Planet killer
purpose: Deep space military platform - able to remain in space indefeinitely - 10 Bays based for fighters(5), bombers(3) or drones(10) each.

name: Coloniser (1st Generation)
purpose: Specifically engineered for short interstellar flight (1 system range) - 10,000 colonists

name: Coloniser (2nd Generation)
purpose: Specifically engineered for Medium interstellar flight (3 system range) - 10,000 colonists

name: Coloniser (3rd Generation)
purpose: Specifically engineered for interstellar flight (7 system range) - 10,000 colonists

name: Coloniser (4th Generation)
purpose: Specifically engineered for long range interstellar flight (15 system range) - 10,000 colonists

name: Coloniser (5th Generation)
purpose: Specifically engineered for deep space interstellar flight (unlimited system range) - 10,000 colonists
